profile.name: Leonardo Burbano
profile.title: Tech Lead, Senior AI and Machine Learning Engineer
profile.description: Turning complex AI workflows into simple, reliable and scalable solutions.

ProjectsSection.title: Featured Projects
ProjectsSection.description: Here are some of the projects I've worked on, showcasing my expertise in AI, machine learning, and software engineering.

navbe-ai.title: Navbe
navbe-ai.description: The workflow brain for AI agents and teams — schedule recurring workflows with persistent context via MCP. Built with a FastAPI orchestrator and Next.js dashboard.

gemini-enterprise-sales-agent.title: Gemini Enterprise Sales Agent
gemini-enterprise-sales-agent.description: Workshop and reference implementation of a sales agent built with Google ADK and the Gemini Enterprise platform, with FastAPI and Next.js clients and cloud deployment.

small-llm-finetuning.title: Fine-tuning a Small LLM
small-llm-finetuning.description: Custom fine-tuning of small language models for domain-specific tasks with optimized performance and reduced resource requirements

qrAlt.github: QR code for the GitHub repository

hints.aiStudio: Sign in with a Google account

prerequisites.heading: Prerequisites
prerequisites.subtitle: Install and configure these tools before starting the workshop

python.title: Python
python.description: Language for the ADK agent and FastAPI backend. Download the latest stable release.

nodejs.title: Node.js
nodejs.description: Runtime for the workshop Next.js frontend.

uv.title: uv
uv.description: Python package and environment manager. Replaces pip and virtualenv.

ide.title: Google Antigravity or any IDE
ide.description: Code editor with agent support. Antigravity, Cursor, or VS Code all work well.

aiStudio.title: Google AI Studio
aiStudio.description: Sign in with a Google account to access Gemini models and test prompts.

agentsCli.title: Google Cloud Agents CLI
agentsCli.description: Install the official CLI and skills to build agents on Agent Platform.

bullets.learn: Learn to build agents with Google ADK and the Gemini Enterprise platform.
bullets.deploy: Deploy both backend and frontend to Google Cloud Run.
bullets.pattern: Reference implementation of a production-ready full-stack agent pattern.
